name: @tank/typescript
description: Advanced TypeScript patterns for type-safe applications. Covers discriminated unions, branded types, exhaustive checking, conditional types, mapped types, template literal types, type-safe error handling (Result pattern), generic constraints, declaration merging, module augmentation, and strict tsconfig recipes. Synthesized from TypeScript official docs, Effective TypeScript (Vanderkam), and production patterns. Triggers: typescript, TS, type, interface, generic, union, discriminated union, branded type, utility type, conditional type, mapped type, template literal, infer, satisfies, as const, tsconfig, strict mode, type guard, type narrowing, type-safe.
